title: hieracium subaurantiacum
intro: Hieracium subaurantiacum, also known as Hawkweed, is a perennial plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) characterized by its yellow flowers and bitter properties. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which can be used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Hieracium subaurantiacum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and promote digestion, as well as its potential to prevent cancer and reduce oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Hieracium subaurantiacum include infusions, tinctures, and ointments, which can be used topically or orally, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their effects.
